```{r fig-4c}
                     axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
  }

  p4c_overall <- make_interaction_plot(
    interaction_scaling %>% dplyr::filter(is.na(.data$annotation_r2)),
    y_col   = "AUPRC_mean",
    y_label = "AUPRC (pooled across datasets)",
    title   = "Interaction grid scaling \u2014 AUPRC",
    baseline_val = baseline_auprc
  )
  ggplot2::ggsave(
    file.path(fig_root, "ensemble_scaling", "auprc_interaction_scaling_overall.png"),
    p4c_overall, width = 10, height = 4, dpi = 150
  )


  for (r2 in sort(unique(na.omit(interaction_scaling$annotation_r2)))) {
    p4c_r2 <- make_interaction_plot(
      interaction_scaling %>% dplyr::filter(.data$annotation_r2 == r2),
      y_col   = "AUPRC_mean",
      y_label = "AUPRC (pooled across datasets)",
      title   = sprintf("Interaction grid scaling \u2014 AUPRC (R\u00b2=%.1f)", r2),
      baseline_val = baseline_auprc
    )
    ggplot2::ggsave(
      file.path(fig_root, "ensemble_scaling",
                sprintf("auprc_interaction_scaling_r2_%.1f.png", r2)),
      p4c_r2, width = 10, height = 4, dpi = 150
    )
  }
  cat("Fig 4c saved.\n")
} else {
  cat("scaling_bins_pooled.csv not found — fig 4c skipped.\n")
}
```

```{r fig-4d}
# 2-lever interaction TPR@0.05: same structure as 4c.
if (!is.null(interaction_scaling) && nrow(interaction_scaling) > 0L) {
  p4d_overall <- make_interaction_plot(
    interaction_scaling %>% dplyr::filter(is.na(.data$annotation_r2)),
    y_col   = "tpr05_mean",
    y_label = "TPR at FPR \u2264 0.05 (pooled)",
    title   = "Interaction grid scaling \u2014 TPR@FPR=0.05",
    baseline_val = baseline_tpr05
  )
  ggplot2::ggsave(
    file.path(fig_root, "ensemble_scaling", "tpr05_interaction_scaling_overall.png"),
    p4d_overall, width = 10, height = 4, dpi = 150
  )


  for (r2 in sort(unique(na.omit(interaction_scaling$annotation_r2)))) {
    p4d_r2 <- make_interaction_plot(
      interaction_scaling %>% dplyr::filter(.data$annotation_r2 == r2),
      y_col   = "tpr05_mean",
      y_label = "TPR at FPR \u2264 0.05 (pooled)",
      title   = sprintf(
        "Interaction grid scaling \u2014 TPR@FPR=0.05 (R\u00b2=%.1f)", r2),
      baseline_val = baseline_tpr05
    )
    ggplot2::ggsave(
      file.path(fig_root, "ensemble_scaling",
                sprintf("tpr05_interaction_scaling_r2_%.1f.png", r2)),
      p4d_r2, width = 10, height = 4, dpi = 150
    )
  }
  cat("Fig 4d saved.\n")
} else {
  cat("scaling_bins_pooled.csv not found — fig 4d skipped.\n")
}
```

# 5. Compute vs AUPRC

Total ensemble compute time (sum of wall_time_sec across all runs in
the ensemble, averaged over datasets) on the x-axis, pooled AUPRC on
the y-axis. Color = ensemble method (spec_name), shape = aggregation
method. Baseline single-fit shown as a black star.

```{r compute-vs-auprc, fig.width=12, fig.height=7}
{
  # Build per-ensemble total compute time: sum wall_time across all

  # individual (non-agg) runs within each (spec_name, dataset_bundle_id),
  # then average over datasets.
  wt_available <- "wall_time_sec" %in% names(model_metrics)

  if (wt_available) {
    # Individual runs only (exclude aggregation pseudo-rows)
    wt_per_ensemble <- model_metrics %>%
      dplyr::filter(!is.na(.data$spec_name),
                    .data$filtering == "purity_filtered",
                    is.na(.data$agg_method) |
                      .data$explore_method != "aggregation") %>%
      dplyr::group_by(.data$spec_name, .data$dataset_bundle_id) %>%
      dplyr::summarise(
        total_wall_sec = sum(.data$wall_time_sec, na.rm = TRUE),
        .groups = "drop"
      ) %>%
      dplyr::group_by(.data$spec_name) %>%
      dplyr::summarise(
        mean_total_wall_sec = mean(.data$total_wall_sec, na.rm = TRUE),
        .groups = "drop"
      )

    # Join with pooled AUPRC (one row per spec x agg_method)
    compute_auprc <- auprc_plot_overall %>%
      dplyr::filter(.data$spec_name != "baseline-single") %>%
      dplyr::inner_join(wt_per_ensemble, by = "spec_name") %>%
      dplyr::mutate(
        compute_min = .data$mean_total_wall_sec / 60
      )

    # Baseline single-fit: average wall_time across datasets (1 run each)
    baseline_wt <- model_metrics %>%
      dplyr::filter(.data$spec_name == "baseline-single",
                    .data$filtering == "purity_filtered",
                    is.na(.data$agg_method) |
                      .data$explore_method != "aggregation",
                    .data$use_case_id == "susine_vanilla") %>%
      dplyr::group_by(.data$dataset_bundle_id) %>%
      dplyr::summarise(
        total_wall_sec = sum(.data$wall_time_sec, na.rm = TRUE),
        .groups = "drop"
      ) %>%
      dplyr::summarise(
        mean_total_wall_sec = mean(.data$total_wall_sec, na.rm = TRUE)
      ) %>%
      dplyr::pull(mean_total_wall_sec)
    baseline_compute_min <- baseline_wt / 60

    if (nrow(compute_auprc) > 0L) {
      # Aggregation method shapes
      agg_shapes <- c(
        "max_elbo"       = 15,  # filled square
        "uniform"        = 16,  # filled circle
        "elbo_softmax"   = 17,  # filled triangle
        "cluster_weight" = 18   # filled diamond
      )

      p_compute <- ggplot(
        compute_auprc,
        aes(x = compute_min, y = AUPRC,
            color = spec_name, shape = agg_method)
      ) +
        geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 0.85) +
        scale_shape_manual(
          values = agg_shapes,
          name = "Aggregation"
        ) +
        # Baseline star
        annotate(
          "point",
          x = baseline_compute_min,
          y = baseline_auprc,
          shape = 8, size = 4, color = "black", stroke = 1.2
        ) +
        annotate(
          "text",
          x = baseline_compute_min,
          y = baseline_auprc,
          label = "baseline single-fit",
          hjust = -0.15, vjust = -0.8, size = 3, color = "black"
        ) +
        labs(
          x = "Total compute time (minutes, mean over datasets)",
          y = "Pooled AUPRC",
          color = "Ensemble Method",
          title = "Compute vs. AUPRC (all annotation R\u00b2 pooled)"
        ) +
        theme_bw() +
        theme(legend.position = "bottom",
              legend.box = "vertical")
      ggsave(file.path(fig_root, "ensemble_scaling",
                       "compute_vs_auprc.png"),
             p_compute, width = 12, height = 7, dpi = 150)
      cat("Fig compute_vs_auprc saved.\n")

      # Per annotation_r2 variant
      for (r2 in sort(unique(na.omit(
        auprc_plot_by_r2$annotation_r2)))) {
        compute_auprc_r2 <- auprc_plot_by_r2 %>%
          dplyr::filter(.data$spec_name != "baseline-single",
                        is.na(.data$annotation_r2) |
                          .data$annotation_r2 == r2) %>%
          dplyr::inner_join(wt_per_ensemble, by = "spec_name") %>%
          dplyr::mutate(compute_min = .data$mean_total_wall_sec / 60)

        if (nrow(compute_auprc_r2) > 0L) {
          # Baseline AUPRC at this r2 level
          bl_auprc_r2 <- auprc_plot_by_r2 %>%
            dplyr::filter(.data$spec_name == "baseline-single",
                          is.na(.data$annotation_r2) |
                            .data$annotation_r2 == r2) %>%
            dplyr::pull(AUPRC)
          bl_auprc_r2 <- if (length(bl_auprc_r2)) bl_auprc_r2[1] else baseline_auprc

          p_r2 <- ggplot(
            compute_auprc_r2,
            aes(x = compute_min, y = AUPRC,
                color = spec_name, shape = agg_method)
          ) +
            geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 0.85) +
            scale_shape_manual(values = agg_shapes, name = "Aggregation") +
            annotate("point", x = baseline_compute_min, y = bl_auprc_r2,
                     shape = 8, size = 4, color = "black", stroke = 1.2) +
            annotate("text", x = baseline_compute_min, y = bl_auprc_r2,
                     label = "baseline single-fit",
                     hjust = -0.15, vjust = -0.8, size = 3, color = "black") +
            labs(
              x = "Total compute time (minutes, mean over datasets)",
              y = "Pooled AUPRC",
              color = "Ensemble Method",
              title = sprintf(
                "Compute vs. AUPRC (annotation R\u00b2 = %.1f)", r2)
            ) +
            theme_bw() +
            theme(legend.position = "bottom", legend.box = "vertical")
          ggsave(file.path(fig_root, "ensemble_scaling",
                           sprintf("compute_vs_auprc_r2_%.1f.png", r2)),
                 p_r2, width = 12, height = 7, dpi = 150)
        }
      }
    } else {
      cat("compute_vs_auprc skipped: no data after joining wall_time.\n")
    }
  } else {
    cat("compute_vs_auprc skipped: wall_time_sec not in model_metrics.\n")
  }
}
```

# 6. Bootstrap AUPRC Stability

Bootstrap analysis to demonstrate that pooled AUPRC estimates are
stable at the available sample size. For each subsample size $n$, we
draw $B$ bootstrap resamples (with replacement) from the full set of
datasets, pool confusion bins within each resample, compute AUPRC,
and report the bootstrap mean $\pm$ 1.96 SE.

```{r bootstrap-auprc-stability, fig.width=12, fig.height=10}
{
  # ── Helper: pooled AUPRC from confusion bins ──
  # Computes average precision directly from binned counts (descending

  # pip_threshold order). AP = (1/P) * sum over positive-containing bins
  # of [ cum_tp_at_bin * n_causal_in_bin / (cum_tp + cum_fp)_at_bin ].
  # This is the bin-level analogue of the per-SNP AP formula.
  pooled_auprc_counts <- function(causal_counts, noncausal_counts) {
    cum_tp  <- cumsum(causal_counts)
    cum_fp  <- cumsum(noncausal_counts)
    total_p <- sum(causal_counts)
    total_n <- sum(noncausal_counts)
    if (total_p == 0L || total_n == 0L) return(NA_real_)
    # For each bin with causal SNPs, the average precision contribution is:
    # precision_at_bin * (n_causal_in_bin / total_positives)
    # This correctly weights by the number of positives discovered at each
    # threshold, matching the per-SNP AP formula.
    precision <- cum_tp / (cum_tp + cum_fp)
    delta_recall <- causal_counts / total_p
    sum(precision * delta_recall)
  }

  # ── Bootstrap stability function ──
  # bins:        confusion_bins tibble (must have dataset_bundle_id,

  #              pip_threshold, n_causal_at_bucket, n_noncausal_at_bucket)
  # dataset_ids: character vector of unique dataset IDs to resample from
  # sizes:       integer vector of subsample sizes
  # B:           number of bootstrap replicates per size
  bootstrap_auprc_stability <- function(bins, dataset_ids, sizes, B = 300L,
                                        progress_label = "bootstrap") {
    cat(sprintf("[%s] preparing dataset x threshold matrices\n", progress_label))
    bins_compact <- bins %>%
      dplyr::select(
        .data$dataset_bundle_id,
        .data$pip_threshold,
        .data$n_causal_at_bucket,
        .data$n_noncausal_at_bucket
      ) %>%
      dplyr::group_by(.data$dataset_bundle_id, .data$pip_threshold) %>%
      dplyr::summarise(
        n_causal_at_bucket = sum(.data$n_causal_at_bucket, na.rm = TRUE),
        n_noncausal_at_bucket = sum(.data$n_noncausal_at_bucket, na.rm = TRUE),
        .groups = "drop"
      )

    pip_levels <- sort(unique(bins_compact$pip_threshold), decreasing = TRUE)
    bins_compact <- bins_compact %>%
      dplyr::mutate(
        dataset_bundle_id = factor(.data$dataset_bundle_id, levels = dataset_ids),
        pip_threshold = factor(.data$pip_threshold, levels = pip_levels)
      )

    causal_mat <- stats::xtabs(
      n_causal_at_bucket ~ dataset_bundle_id + pip_threshold,
      data = bins_compact
    )
    noncausal_mat <- stats::xtabs(
      n_noncausal_at_bucket ~ dataset_bundle_id + pip_threshold,
      data = bins_compact
    )

    n_dataset_ids <- length(dataset_ids)
    cat(sprintf("[%s] matrix prep complete: %d datasets x %d thresholds\n",
                progress_label, nrow(causal_mat), ncol(causal_mat)))

    results <- vector("list", length(sizes))
    for (si in seq_along(sizes)) {
      n <- sizes[si]
      cat(sprintf("[%s] size %d/%d (n=%d, B=%d)\n",
                  progress_label, si, length(sizes), n, B))

      weight_mat <- replicate(
        B,
        tabulate(sample.int(n_dataset_ids, size = n, replace = TRUE),
                 nbins = n_dataset_ids)
      )
      pooled_causal <- crossprod(causal_mat, weight_mat)
      pooled_noncausal <- crossprod(noncausal_mat, weight_mat)
      auprcs <- vapply(
        seq_len(B),
        function(b) {
          pooled_auprc_counts(
            causal_counts = pooled_causal[, b],
            noncausal_counts = pooled_noncausal[, b]
          )
        },
        numeric(1)
      )

      results[[si]] <- tibble::tibble(
        n_datasets = n,
        auprc_mean = mean(auprcs, na.rm = TRUE),
        auprc_se   = sd(auprcs, na.rm = TRUE)
      )
    }
    cat(sprintf("[%s] complete\n", progress_label))
    dplyr::bind_rows(results)
  }

  # ── Run bootstrap for baseline single-fit (susine_vanilla only) ──
  baseline_bins <- confusion_bins %>%
    dplyr::filter(.data$spec_name == "baseline-single",
                  .data$use_case_id == "susine_vanilla",
                  is.na(.data$agg_method))
  baseline_datasets <- sort(unique(baseline_bins$dataset_bundle_id))
  n_total <- length(baseline_datasets)
  cat("Bootstrap stability: total datasets =", n_total, "\n")

  if (n_total >= 20L) {
    # Subsample sizes: steps of ~10% of total, from ~10% up to 100%
    step <- max(10L, as.integer(round(n_total / 10)))
    sizes <- sort(unique(c(
      seq(step, n_total, by = step),
      n_total
    )))
    # Ensure we don't go below a reasonable minimum
    sizes <- sizes[sizes >= 10L]

    B <- 300L
    set.seed(42)
    cat("Running bootstrap: sizes =", paste(sizes, collapse = ", "),
        ", B =", B, "\n")
    cat("[baseline bootstrap] starting\n")

    boot_baseline <- bootstrap_auprc_stability(
      bins        = baseline_bins,
      dataset_ids = baseline_datasets,
      sizes       = sizes,
      B           = B,
      progress_label = "baseline bootstrap"
    ) %>%
      dplyr::mutate(
        ci_lo = .data$auprc_mean - 1.96 * .data$auprc_se,
        ci_hi = .data$auprc_mean + 1.96 * .data$auprc_se,
        spec_label = "baseline single-fit (vanilla)"
      )

    # ── Combined baseline figure (faceted: AUPRC + SE panels) ──
    boot_long <- boot_baseline %>%
      tidyr::pivot_longer(
        cols = c(auprc_mean, auprc_se),
        names_to = "metric",
        values_to = "value"
      ) %>%
      dplyr::mutate(
        ci_lo = dplyr::if_else(.data$metric == "auprc_mean", .data$ci_lo, NA_real_),
        ci_hi = dplyr::if_else(.data$metric == "auprc_mean", .data$ci_hi, NA_real_),
        metric_label = dplyr::if_else(
          .data$metric == "auprc_mean",
          "Pooled AUPRC (mean \u00b1 1.96 SE)",
          "Bootstrap SE"
        )
      )

    p_boot <- ggplot(boot_long, aes(x = n_datasets, y = value)) +
      geom_ribbon(data = dplyr::filter(boot_long, .data$metric == "auprc_mean"),
                  aes(ymin = ci_lo, ymax = ci_hi),
                  fill = "steelblue", alpha = 0.25) +
      geom_line(color = "steelblue", linewidth = 0.8) +
      geom_point(color = "steelblue", size = 2) +
      facet_wrap(~metric_label, scales = "free_y", ncol = 1) +
      labs(x = "Number of datasets in bootstrap resample", y = NULL,
           title = "AUPRC estimation stability (baseline single-fit)") +
      theme_bw()

    ggsave(file.path(fig_root, "ensemble_scaling",
                     "bootstrap_auprc_stability.png"),
           p_boot, width = 10, height = 8, dpi = 150)

    # ── Optional: run for a few ensemble specs too ──
    # Pick the top-performing spec per agg_method to show stability
    # is not unique to the baseline.
    agg_bins <- confusion_bins %>%
      dplyr::filter(!is.na(.data$agg_method),
                    !is.na(.data$spec_name),
                    .data$spec_name != "baseline-single")
    agg_combos <- agg_bins %>%
      dplyr::distinct(.data$spec_name, .data$agg_method)

    # Select up to 3 representative (spec, agg) combos via highest AUPRC
    if (nrow(agg_combos) > 0L && exists("auprc_plot_overall")) {
      top_combos <- auprc_plot_overall %>%
        dplyr::filter(.data$spec_name != "baseline-single") %>%
        dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(.data$AUPRC)) %>%
        dplyr::slice_head(n = 3L)

      boot_ensemble_list <- list()
      for (ri in seq_len(nrow(top_combos))) {
        sn <- top_combos$spec_name[ri]
        am <- top_combos$agg_method[ri]
        combo_label <- sprintf("ensemble bootstrap %d/%d: %s (%s)",
                               ri, nrow(top_combos), sn, am)
        combo_bins <- confusion_bins %>%
          dplyr::filter(.data$spec_name == sn,
                        .data$agg_method == am)
        combo_datasets <- sort(unique(combo_bins$dataset_bundle_id))
        if (length(combo_datasets) < 20L) {
          cat(sprintf("[%s] skipped: only %d datasets available\n",
                      combo_label, length(combo_datasets)))
          next
        }

        cat(sprintf("[%s] starting\n", combo_label))

        boot_ensemble_list[[ri]] <- bootstrap_auprc_stability(
          bins        = combo_bins,
          dataset_ids = combo_datasets,
          sizes       = sizes[sizes <= length(combo_datasets)],
          B           = B,
          progress_label = combo_label
        ) %>%
          dplyr::mutate(
            ci_lo = .data$auprc_mean - 1.96 * .data$auprc_se,
            ci_hi = .data$auprc_mean + 1.96 * .data$auprc_se,
            spec_label = paste0(sn, " (", am, ")")
          )
      }

      if (length(boot_ensemble_list) > 0L) {
        boot_all <- dplyr::bind_rows(
          boot_baseline,
          dplyr::bind_rows(boot_ensemble_list)
        )

        boot_all_long <- boot_all %>%
          tidyr::pivot_longer(
            cols = c(auprc_mean, auprc_se),
            names_to = "metric",
            values_to = "value"
          ) %>%
          dplyr::mutate(
            ci_lo = dplyr::if_else(.data$metric == "auprc_mean", .data$ci_lo, NA_real_),
            ci_hi = dplyr::if_else(.data$metric == "auprc_mean", .data$ci_hi, NA_real_),
            metric_label = dplyr::if_else(
              .data$metric == "auprc_mean",
              "Pooled AUPRC (mean \u00b1 1.96 SE)",
              "Bootstrap SE"
            )
          )

        p_boot_multi <- ggplot(boot_all_long,
                               aes(x = n_datasets, y = value,
                                   color = spec_label, fill = spec_label)) +
          geom_ribbon(
            data = dplyr::filter(boot_all_long, .data$metric == "auprc_mean"),
            aes(ymin = ci_lo, ymax = ci_hi),
            alpha = 0.15, color = NA) +
          geom_line(linewidth = 0.7) +
          geom_point(size = 1.8) +
          facet_wrap(~metric_label, scales = "free_y", ncol = 1) +
          labs(x = "Number of datasets in bootstrap resample", y = NULL,
               color = "Method", fill = "Method",
               title = "AUPRC estimation stability (selected methods)") +
          theme_bw() +
          theme(legend.position = "bottom")

        ggsave(file.path(fig_root, "ensemble_scaling",
                         "bootstrap_auprc_stability_multi.png"),
               p_boot_multi, width = 12, height = 10, dpi = 150)
      }
    }

    # Print summary
    cat("\nBootstrap stability summary (baseline):\n")
    print(knitr::kable(
      boot_baseline %>%
        dplyr::mutate(
          auprc_mean = round(auprc_mean, 4),
          auprc_se   = round(auprc_se, 5),
          ci_lo      = round(ci_lo, 4),
          ci_hi      = round(ci_hi, 4)
        ) %>%
        dplyr::select(n_datasets, auprc_mean, auprc_se, ci_lo, ci_hi),
      col.names = c("N datasets", "Mean AUPRC", "SE", "95% CI lo", "95% CI hi")
    ))
    cat("Fig bootstrap_auprc_stability saved.\n")
  } else {
    cat("Bootstrap stability skipped: fewer than 20 datasets.\n")
  }
}
```

# Summary Table

```{r summary-table}
if (exists("auprc_plot_overall") && nrow(auprc_plot_overall) > 0L) {
  summary_tbl <- auprc_plot_overall %>%
    dplyr::select(spec_name, agg_method, AUPRC) %>%
    dplyr::left_join(
      tpr05_plot_overall %>%
        dplyr::select(spec_name, agg_method, tpr_fpr05),
      by = c("spec_name", "agg_method")
    ) %>%
    dplyr::arrange(.data$spec_name, .data$agg_method) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      AUPRC     = round(.data$AUPRC,     4L),
      tpr_fpr05 = round(.data$tpr_fpr05, 4L)
    )

  print(knitr::kable(
    summary_tbl,
    col.names = c("Spec", "Aggregation", "Pooled AUPRC", "TPR @ FPR=0.05"),
    caption   = "Pooled AUPRC and TPR@FPR=0.05 by ensemble spec and aggregation method"
  ))
  readr::write_csv(summary_tbl,
                   file.path(consolidated_dir, "summary_table.csv"))
  cat("Summary table written.\n")
} else {
  cat("Summary table skipped: auprc_plot_overall not available.\n")
}
```

# Session Info

```{r session}
cat("\nFigures written to:", fig_root, "\n")
cat("Files:\n")
for (d in fig_dirs) {
  figs <- list.files(file.path(fig_root, d))
  if (length(figs)) cat(sprintf("  %s/: %s\n", d, paste(figs, collapse = ", ")))
}
sessionInfo()
```
